message:
fix: cross-platform compilation for macOS and Windows

- ancillary.rs: Cast cmsg_len to usize for macOS where libc::cmsghdr.cmsg_len is u32
- stream.rs: Cast msg_controllen to usize for macOS compatibility
- windows.rs: Import parent reactor types at module level so iocp_impl submodule can resolve them

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
